home_seo_title: Cascade - a quieter place to think in lists
home_seo_description: Cascade is an infinitely nested outliner. One outline for everything.
footer_tagline: One list to rule them all.
hero_heading: A quieter place to think in lists.
hero_subtitle_line1: Cascade is an infinitely nested outliner.
hero_subtitle_line2: One outline for all your notes.
hero_demo_hint: Or try the outline below it’s live, nothing is saved.
hero_demo_footer: This is just a taste the real app goes much further.
feature_infinite_depth_description: Nest as deep as your thoughts go. Every item is a list of its own, all the way down.
feature_collapse_noise_description: Fold away everything you’re not working on and give one branch your full attention.
feature_keyboard_first_description: Capture, reorder, and restructure without your hands leaving the home row.
pricing_body_line1: Cascade is in development, and free to use while we build it.
pricing_body_line2: No tiers, no trials, no credit card.
faq_q1_answer: Yes. Cascade is free to use while we develop the application, in the future we may introduce paid features, but the core experience will remain free.
faq_q2_question: How is it different from other outliners?
faq_q2_answer: Right now, we're focusing on perfecting the basics, so it feels very similar to existing tools. We're in active development, though, and have some exciting, unique features on the horizon!
faq_q3_question: Does it work on my phone?
faq_q3_answer: Cascade runs in the browser, so it works anywhere a browser does including your phone. An independent app is possible in the future.
changelog_seo_description: See what's new in Cascade, the infinitely nested outliner.
login_seo_description: Log in to Cascade, the infinitely nested outliner.
register_seo_description: Create a free Cascade account and start outlining.
privacy_seo_description: How Cascade collects, uses, and protects your data.
privacy_intro: This Privacy Policy explains how Cascade ("we", "us") collects, uses, and protects your information when you use our application.
privacy_info_collect_body: We collect the information you provide when creating an account (such as your name and email address), and information generated by your use of the app (such as the content you create and store in Cascade). If you sign in with a third-party provider (e.g. GitHub or Google), we receive basic profile information from that provider.
privacy_info_use_body: We use your information to provide and improve the service, authenticate you, communicate with you about your account, and comply with legal obligations. We do not sell your personal data.
privacy_data_storage_body: Your data is stored on secure infrastructure and we take reasonable technical and organizational measures to protect it against unauthorized access, loss, or misuse.
privacy_cookies_body: We use cookies and similar technologies as necessary to operate the service, such as keeping you signed in.
privacy_your_rights_body: You may access, correct, or delete your personal data at any time by contacting us. You may also request a copy of your data or ask us to stop processing it, subject to applicable law.
privacy_changes_body: We may update this policy from time to time. Material changes will be communicated by posting the updated policy on this page.
privacy_contact_body: Questions about this policy? Email us at
terms_seo_description: The terms that govern your use of Cascade.
terms_intro: These Terms of Service ("Terms") govern your use of Cascade. By creating an account or using the app, you agree to these Terms.
terms_using_body: You must be able to form a binding contract to use Cascade, and you are responsible for maintaining the security of your account and for all activity that occurs under it.
terms_content_body: You retain ownership of the content you create in Cascade. You grant us a license to host and process that content solely to provide the service to you.
terms_acceptable_use_body: You agree not to misuse the service, including attempting to disrupt it, access it using unauthorized means, or use it for unlawful purposes.
terms_termination_body: You may stop using Cascade and delete your account at any time. We may suspend or terminate access if these Terms are violated.
terms_disclaimer_body: Cascade is provided "as is" without warranties of any kind. To the extent permitted by law, we are not liable for indirect, incidental, or consequential damages arising from your use of the service.
terms_changes_body: We may update these Terms from time to time. Continued use of Cascade after changes take effect constitutes acceptance of the updated Terms.
terms_contact_body: Questions about these Terms? Email us at
oauth_account_not_linked: That email is already registered with a different sign-in method. Log in with your original method, or use a different email.
oauth_generic_error: Something went wrong signing you in. Try again.
outliner_empty_tree: This tree is empty. Add a node to get started.
